description_long: This house is a compact, rectangular residential structure with a flat roof and minimal exterior ornamentation. The facade features a simple arrangement of windows and a single main entryway, likely a door, positioned off-center. The exterior walls are smooth and uniformly colored, suggesting a modern or utilitarian architectural style. Windows are small and symmetrically placed on the front and rear, with additional openings on the sides. The roof appears flat and unadorned, with no visible chimneys or overhangs. The overall design is functional, with a focus on simplicity and efficiency.
description: A small, rectangular house with a flat roof, smooth walls, and symmetrically arranged windows and a single main entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway and a set of small, evenly spaced windows.
description_view_1: Rear view with a central window and minimal exterior features.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the flat roof and the depth of the house, with a window visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with additional windows and a plain wall surface.
attribute_entryway_design: Single plain door with no porch or decorative elements, flush with the facade
